property.name: dfs.blocksize
property.description: Default block size in bytes (128MB) optimized for distributed big data workloads.

property.name: dfs.namenode.name.dir
property.description: Path where NameNode stores transaction logs and fsimage files.

property.name: dfs.datanode.data.dir
property.description: Path where DataNode replicas are stored.

property.name: dfs.permissions.enabled
property.description: Disable HDFS permissions checks in laboratory Docker setups for simpler developer validation.

property.name: dfs.namenode.http-address
property.description: HTTP web UI port of the NameNode.
